rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase concerns property tax appraisal values under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §44.044 governs school district contracting with persons indebted to the district. These provisions address unrelated subject matters with no operational overlap.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district by resolution may establish regulations permitting the school district to refuse to enter into a contract or other transaction with a person indebted to the school district.
_note: No conflict. §44.044 is a procurement/debt provision; the proposed change affects property tax exemptions. No cross-reference between these provisions exists in the rule text.
